purpose: Replacement queue for current built in procedural Apartment God objects and visual pieces.
replacement_rules: Do not replace runtime visuals from this inventory pass alone.
Use the CSV row number as the stable approval reference.
Create the real PNG or WebP asset at the replacement path first.
Keep procedural drawing and existing SVG placeholders as fallback until the replacement is approved and tested.
Wire one object kind or one special object ID at a time.
Do not deploy from this pass.

known_registry_gaps.issue: ATV is a current object and an atv_top.svg placeholder exists, but assetRegistry.js does not map the atv kind yet.

Drawable procedural kind and functional object, but no explicit final asset registry mapping yet.
Drawable procedural kind and functional object, but no explicit final asset registry mapping yet.
Drawable and functional garage object, but no explicit final asset registry mapping yet.
Buildable workout gear uses runtime generated object, but no explicit final asset registry mapping yet.

next_recommended_passes: Open asset_inventory.csv and choose the first P1 object to produce as real art.
Create the approved PNG or WebP inside the replacement path named in the CSV.
Add or update assetRegistry.js mapping only for the approved item.
Test that the game still loads and that fallback art still works when the sprite is missing.
Repeat one object or one object kind at a time.
